personality.targetAudience: frequent travelers and credit card users

_observations: SharpGrotesk is a paid commercial typeface (Sharp Type) — premium-print signal vs. Google-Fonts-default rest of competitor set
0px border-radius across all components — explicitly sharp, journalism-magazine aesthetic, opposite of HfP/UP's rounded buttons and TPG's full pills
Background is #F4F6F8 (cool off-white) not pure #FFFFFF — slight tint reads as paper rather than glare
Primary CTA is #FFB71B (gold-orange) — sits in the warm-accent / luxury-finance register, similar to dubaipoints.ae's --gold but more saturated
Text colour #021D49 is a very dark navy — high contrast against the off-white background, formal feel
